layout_description:
Option: OPT-1-REVISED
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with 2:1 width allocation (left column dominant). The slide uses a clean, professional structure with the title 'Context and objectives' at the top, followed by two side-by-side content containers that fill the remaining vertical space. The left column (Context) receives approximately 65% of the horizontal space to accommodate dense multi-paragraph content, while the right column (Objectives) receives approximately 30% for a compact numbered list. A small gutter (5%) separates the columns. Both columns share identical top and bottom edges, creating strong horizontal alignment. The layout maximizes vertical space utilization with minimal top margin below the title and extends content containers to near the bottom of the slide safe area. No decorative bottom layer is needed as the content fills the slide confidently. Reading flow is natural: title → left column → right column. This revision addresses the judge feedback by increasing font size in the right column and expanding vertical spacing between objective rows to fill the container more completely.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 2
  Allocation: [0.65, 0.3]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Context): The dominant content container occupying the left two-thirds of the slide body area. This container holds dense multi-paragraph text organized as a structured bullet list with multiple hierarchy levels. The content is presented using native PowerPoint bullets with brand-color bullet markers. The section begins with a bold header 'Context' in brand primary color, followed by a thin solid horizontal line (brand dark color) spanning the full column width as a header underline. Below the header, the content is organized into major bullet points (each representing a time period or theme: '2024/2025' start-up, '2026' scaling activities, technology solution development, workflow tool status, and today's agenda) with nested sub-bullets (rendered as indented brand-color circle bullets for the 'o' markers in the source). Key phrases within the text are bolded for emphasis: time periods, business milestones, monetary values, and the ATLAS technology name. The text is left-aligned with a small left inset from the container edge. Vertical spacing between major bullet sections is minimal due to content density — thin dashed grey separator lines are placed between major bullet groups to create visual rhythm without consuming vertical space. The container background is white with no border or fill. Font size is set to medium-to-large body font size (targeting the upper range of the body font scale, matching the increased size applied to C1) to ensure visual consistency across both columns while fitting all content comfortably within the allocated space without overflow. The container stretches vertically to fill all available space between the title area and the slide bottom margin, with content distributed evenly using flexGrow on major bullet sections to prevent top-stacking.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — Objectives): A compact secondary container occupying the right third of the slide body area, aligned as an equal-peer with the left column (identical top and bottom edges). This container holds a numbered list of three objectives. The section begins with a bold header 'Objectives' in brand primary color, followed by a thin solid horizontal line (brand dark color) spanning the full column width as a header underline. Below the header, the three objectives are presented as an enumeration list with numbered badges. Each objective row contains a small filled square badge (brand primary color, small corner radius proportional to the increased font size, white bold number centered: '1.', '2.', '3.') positioned at the left edge of the row, vertically centered. The objective text sits to the right of each badge, left-aligned, using body font in brand text color. Font size for objective text is increased to large body font size (targeting 18pt or the maximum allowed body font ceiling) to fill the container more completely and address the under-filled space identified in judge feedback. The numbered badges scale proportionally with the increased font size to maintain visual balance. Key phrases within each objective are bolded: 'Review outcomes from ATLAS Phase 1', 'Demo ATLAS Phase 1 solution', 'discuss funding requirements for ATLAS Phase 2'. Time allocations '[10 mins]' appear at the end of each objective in regular weight. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines are placed between the three objective rows (not after the last one) to create visual rhythm. Vertical spacing between objective rows is significantly increased (generous top and bottom padding within each row section) to distribute the three objectives evenly across the full container height, ensuring the content collectively fills at least 65-70% of the container inner height. Each of the three objective rows receives equal flexGrow values to distribute vertical space evenly and prevent content from clustering at the top. The container background is white with no border or fill. The container stretches vertically to match the full height of the left column, creating strong horizontal alignment across the slide.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BOTTOM LAYER — Inactive): Not active. The slide content (two columns with dense text in the left column and well-distributed numbered objectives in the right column) fills the available space confidently. No visual grouping or background fill is needed. The white slide background provides sufficient contrast and the content containers define their own boundaries through alignment and spacing.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER — Inactive): Not active. No cross-container connectors, arrows, or overlay elements are needed for this slide. The two columns are independent content sections with no visual links between them.
